schema_version.description: Schema version. Do not modify manually.

analyzed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this summary was generated.

analyzed_commit.description: Full SHA of the commit that was analyzed.

analyzed_by.description: Identifier of the agent/tool that generated this summary.

summary.description: TODO: Replace with structured sections. Temporary free-text summary of cross-reference findings across all four analysis outputs. Expected eventual structure: repo classification, tech stack synthesis, doc coverage assessment, AI tooling adoption level, and downstream flags.

notes.description: Observations, assumptions, or cross-reference mismatches discovered during synthesis. Note which of the four analysis inputs were available and which were missing.

description: Repository structure analysis summary (v0.1.0 — SHELL). Cross-reference synthesis of code-structure, work-docs, conceptual-docs, and ai-process-inventory outputs. Schema is intentionally minimal — requirements to be defined after reviewing real output examples from the four analysis prompts.
